# SIGNAL(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  signal — send ARG signal

## SYNOPSIS
  signal [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
Transmit a signal code to awaken hidden narrative elements.

## OPTIONS
  3.14159  wake ZERO
  0x5343  contact Special Circumstances
  0x44  contact Daedalus

## EXAMPLES
  signal 3.14159
  signal 0x5343

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation

  help, man, commands
